result.stderr:
3dfix 1.0.4
Copyright (C) 2026 Jon Gallant

  -i, --input      Required. The absolute path to the 3d file to fix.

  -o, --output     The absolute path to the fixed 3d file to output. Defaults to
                   appending '_fixed' to the InputFile file name.

  -v, --verbose    Set to true to enable extended output.

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.
